# Tractor

## Tags
farming, farmer, ranch, harvest, equipment, vehicle

## Categories
transportation, sustainability, food-beverage

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/tractor)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Tractor;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Tractor { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
